hero.subtitle: A story of encounters, stars, and the warmth of an eternal summer.

info.title: What is Adachi to Shimamura?
info.subtitle: For first-time visitors
paragraphs: Adachi to Shimamura is a Japanese light novel written by Hitoma Iruma and illustrated by Non. The story follows the relationship between two high school girls: Adachi, a loner who prefers spending time in the gymnasium, and Shimamura, a carefree girl who often skips class.
Their friendship begins on the second floor of the gymnasium, where they meet by chance. Gradually, what starts as a superficial connection becomes something deeper, tender, and more complex.
The series has been adapted into manga, anime, and multiple CD dramas, earning a special place in readers' hearts for its delicate exploration of intimacy, loneliness, and first love.
